+++ ncr.c	1999/06/13 15:59:53
@@ -47,7 +47,6 @@
 #define NCR_GETCC_WITHMSG
 
 #if defined (__FreeBSD__) && defined(KERNEL)
-#include "opt_failsafe.h"
 #include "opt_ncr.h"
 #endif /* defined(KERNEL) */
